description: Part C body-shadow regression pin (N-C-10) — route signature has params.slug type annotation, but handler body destructures slug from req.json() NOT from params. Attacker supplies body.slug, scoping is user-controlled. Purely lexical name-match on 'slug' would falsely suppress; binding-origin check detects that slug's VariableDeclaration initializer is await req.json(), not await params. Must still emit after Part C.
